items.title: Instructions, state and determinism: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? The same source file must always produce identical output, regardless of input, state, environment, or undefined behavior.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Agreement is expected only after holding all relevant inputs and defined state constant; differing observations should be traced to a changed input, state, environment, or invalid assumption.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Agreement is expected only after holding all relevant inputs and defined state constant; differing observations should be traced to a changed input, state, environment, or invalid assumption.
